_comment: Plugin hook wiring for SREDNOFF OS (auto-loaded when the plugin is enabled). Targets the bash hooks (macOS/Linux) and requires jq + grep -P in PATH. Windows users: enable hooks via the manual PowerShell wiring in .claude/settings.windows.example.json instead (a single plugin hooks.json cannot branch per-OS). ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} resolves to the installed plugin directory.
